zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Clifford於大約1310年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福時，他的父親William De Clifford41歲，母親Katherine de Maulton21歲。他於1356年與Ermenburge Hussey在英國格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 白 希雷斯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1376年之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Clifford于大约1310年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福时，他的父亲William De Clifford41岁，母亲Katherine de Maulton21岁。他于1356年与Ermenburge Hussey在英国格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 白 希雷斯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1376年之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Clifford in Devon, Gloucestershire, and Yorkshire, and in particular Herefordshire. The placename is derived from Old English clif ‘slope’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish: adoption of the name in 1 above as Anglicization of several Irish names, especially Ó Clúmháin ‘descendant of Clúmhán’, which was the surname of an ecclesiastical family in Sligo and can be traced back to the 12th century. The personal name meant ‘little hairy one’, a diminutive of Irish clúmach ‘hairy’, from clúmh ‘feathers, plumage, down; hair or fur’. Clifford was also adopted for Coleman and in Fermanagh for Crifferty, Clifferty, and Cliffordy, which are Anglicized forms of Mac Raibheartaigh (compare Rafferty ).

History: A powerful Anglo-Norman family of this name in England and Ireland trace their descent from Walter de Clifford, who took the name from Clifford (Castle) in Herefordshire in the 12th century, after acquiring the Clifford barony by marriage.

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Clifford was born about 1310, in Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William De Clifford, was 41 and his mother, Katherine de Maulton, was 21. He married Ermenburge Hussey in 1356, in Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1376, in his hometown.

Il a épousé Ermenburge Hussey en 1356, à Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1376, dans sa ville natale.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Cliffordが約1310年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフランプトン オン セバーンで生まれた時，父William De Cliffordは41歳，母Katherine de Maultonは21歳であった。1356年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフランプトン ビー シアーエンセスターでErmenburge Husseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1376年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.Frampton, Gloucestershire, , England: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터
ko.lifeSummary: John de Clifford(이)가 대략 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프램프턴  세버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Clifford(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine de Maulton(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1356년 영국 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터에서 Ermenburge Hussey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1376년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Clifford nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William De Clifford, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Maulton, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Ermenburge Hussey em 1356, em Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1376, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Clifford родился около 1310 г. в местности фрамптон он сивирн, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William De Clifford было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Maulton, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermenburge Hussey в 1356 г. в местности фрамптон би сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1376 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Clifford nació aproximadamente 1310, en Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William De Clifford, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Katherine de Maulton, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Ermenburge Hussey en 1356, en Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1376, en su pueblo.
